error.break_connection: We couldn’t reset this connection. Please try again.
error.confirm_account: We couldn’t confirm your account. Please try again.
error.confirm_accounts_try_again_later: An error occurred while confirming accounts. You will have an opportunity to try again later.
error.connect_account: We couldn’t connect your account. Please try again.
error.delete_account_check_connection: Deletion failed. Please check your connection and try again in a few seconds.
error.exclude_account: We couldn’t exclude your account. Please try again.
error.remove_connection: We couldn’t remove this connection. Please try again.
error.repair_connection: We couldn’t repair the Plaid connection with your account. Please try again.
error.save_data_try_again_later: An error occurred while saving data. You will have an opportunity to try again later.
error.start_connection: We couldn’t initiate the Plaid connection flow. Please try again.
error.unlink_failed: Unlink failed. Please check your connection and try again in a few seconds.

label.account_and_unmatched_transactions_delet: This account and any unmatched transactions will be deleted.
label.account_stops_syncing_new_data: This account will stop syncing new data, and any unmatched transactions will be deleted.

label.confirm_remove_accounts_for_institution_: Please confirm you wish to remove all accounts belonging to {{institutionName}}
label.connect_bank_accounts_and_credit_cards: Connect your bank accounts and credit cards to automatically import your business transactions.
label.deselect_unused_accounts: Please deselect any accounts you don't use for your business.
label.import_data_simple_integration: Importez des données grâce à une intégration simple.
label.link_bank_accounts_and_credit_cards: Link your bank accounts and credit cards
label.link_more_accounts_any_time: Vous pouvez lier d’autres comptes en tout temps à partir de la section Activité bancaire
label.link_your_bank_accounts_description: Linking your bank accounts allows us to load your bank transactions and automatically categorize them.
label.may_take_few_minutes: This may take a few minutes
label.may_take_up_to_hours_one: This may take up to {{displayCount}} hour.
label.may_take_up_to_hours_other: This may take up to {{displayCount}} hours.
label.may_take_up_to_minutes_one: This may take up to {{displayCount}} minute.
label.may_take_up_to_minutes_other: This may take up to {{displayCount}} minutes.
label.no_accounts_to_confirm: There are no accounts to confirm. You may close this modal.
label.no_data_sync_until_confirm: No data will be synced until you confirm.
label.populate_accounting_dashboard_three_step: Populate your accounting dashboard in 3 steps
label.remove_unused_accounts_next_step: Vous aurez la possibilité de supprimer les comptes que vous n’utilisez pas pour votre entreprise à l’étape suivante.
label.select_accounts_use_one: Nous avons récupéré le compte ci-dessous de votre institution. Désélectionnez-le si vous ne souhaitez pas le connecter.
label.select_accounts_use_other: Nous avons récupéré les comptes ci-dessous de votre institution. Désélectionnez ceux que vous ne souhaitez pas connecter.

prompt.use_other_bank_accounts_or_cards: Utilisez-vous d'autres comptes bancaires ou cartes de crédit pour votre entreprise?
prompt.which_accounts_for_business: Quels comptes utilisez-vous pour votre entreprise?

tooltip.cannot_link_demo_business: Account linking is not available for demo businesses. This is a sample business that uses example data instead of real bank connections.
